copy.title: Catch-and-Shoot — Left Wing, Short Closeout
copy.prompt: Help-side closeout, short. Catch on rhythm.
copy.game_context: 4-on-4 half-court. Ball reversed from the right slot to the left wing on a swing pass; no shot-clock pressure.
copy.possession_setup: The ball is at the right slot. You are the left wing. x2 was helping one pass away; he is closing out short, hips already turned back toward the ball.
copy.decision_moment: You catch in your shooting pocket. x2 is still two strides out, feet under him but his cushion is yours.
copy.visible_cue: x2's feet are pointed at the ball, not at you. The cushion in front of your release is open.
copy.best_read: Catch on the lift and release into your pocket before his second step. The shot is open because he bet on helping.
copy.explanation_md: **Advantage or Reset — same read, other side.** A short closeout is a short closeout. Left wing, right wing — the cue is his cushion, not your spot. When the defender's feet are still pointed at the ball and his hands aren't up, the shot is open before his second step. **Catch in your pocket. Lift. Release.**

feedback.correct: Right read. Same closeout, other side — his cushion was yours and you took it.
feedback.partial: You drove past, but the catch-and-shoot was the bigger advantage. He sold the help; punish it on the lift.
feedback.wrong: Read his cushion, not your spot. Short closeout = open shot.

self_review_checklist: Did I read his cushion before the catch?
Did I catch in my shooting pocket (knees bent, hands ready)?
Did I release before his second step?
Did I follow through, not retreat?
acceptable_reads: Rip and drive past the closeout — gets you to the rim, but a clean catch-and-shoot was the bigger advantage.
bad_reads: Swing the ball back — wastes the help-side advantage the rotation just gave you.
Pump-fake and hold — gives x2 the time he was missing; the shot is gone.

shoot.label: Catch and shoot in rhythm.
shoot.feedback_text: Best read. Same short closeout, other side. His cushion was yours — you released before his second step.

rip_and_drive.label: Rip the ball and drive past the closeout.
rip_and_drive.feedback_text: Okay. The rip works once he commits to the contest, but the open shot off the catch was the cleaner advantage.
rip_and_drive.partial_feedback_text: The drive got you something, but the shot was the bigger advantage. Take the cushion first.

pass_back.label: Swing it back to the passer.
pass_back.feedback_text: Not yet. Passing back kills the help-side advantage — x2 resets and your shot is gone.

pump_fake_hold.label: Pump-fake and hold the ball.
pump_fake_hold.feedback_text: Not yet. The pump gives him the half-second he was missing. The catch was the shot.
